independence_attestation: Reviewer reports sequential review against the frozen checklist without consulting the machine verdict.
o1_rationale: The reported durations satisfy the numerical limits but were modeled rather than measured as wall-clock human review time. They therefore cannot establish the preregistered human-effort endpoint.
required_next_action: Repeat the frozen ten-row review with observed wall-clock timing, preserving the existing qualitative judgments as a separate exploratory review.
